candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation and impairment of intangible and tangible assets
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row above financial lines, but it appears to be a company-wide operating D&A total rather than a COGS-specific D&A line. Since the selected COGS bucket is only 'Goods for resale' plus 'Consumables and Materials', there is no clear evidence of a separate COGS-only D&A amount that should be added without risking misallocation or double counting.

variables.notes: Only a combined operating D&A row is visible; no COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. Conservative output is empty to avoid double counting or misclassifying total operating D&A as COGS_DA.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation and impairment of intangible and tangible assets
candidates.why: This is the only explicit D&A row above the financial section and it sits alongside operating expense buckets, suggesting D&A is presented separately from the selected XSGA component rows. However, the label appears to cover total operating D&A, not SG&A-only D&A, so adding it to XSGA_DA could over-assign production-related depreciation/amortisation.

variables.notes: The visible D&A row appears separate from the selected XSGA component rows, but it is not clearly limited to SG&A/overhead and may include production-related D&A. Conservative choice is empty pending manual review.
